intro: A collection of things I've built — from side experiments to production systems.

items.title: OceanUI Design System
items.description: A comprehensive component library built with React and TypeScript, featuring 80+ accessible components with dark mode support.

items.title: DataStream Analytics
items.description: Real-time analytics dashboard processing 1M+ events per day with WebSocket-powered live updates.

items.title: Nebula CLI
items.description: A developer productivity toolkit with AI-powered code generation and project scaffolding.

items.title: Pulse — Health Tracker
items.description: Cross-platform health tracking app with ML-powered insights and wearable device integration.
